description: Plugin-distributed hooks for hospitality-hotel-operations. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable hospitality anti-patterns (occupancy/ADR optimized with no RevPAR; a channel comparison on gross rate with no net-ADR/commission; overbooking with no walk-protocol; loyalty measured by member count). Set HOTEL_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
